description_long: This fence features a dense, green hedge integrated with a linear metal framework, providing both a natural and structured barrier. The hedge is lush and well-maintained, with foliage extending the full length of the fence, partially obscuring the metal rails and vertical posts. Thin, black metal rods protrude vertically above the hedge, adding a subtle security element without being overly imposing. At one end, a prominent square post with a dark cap anchors the structure, contrasting with the organic greenery. The base appears to be a solid, low wall, likely made of concrete or stone, supporting the hedge and metalwork. The overall design blends urban utility with decorative landscaping, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or residential boundaries.
description: A linear fence combining a dense green hedge with a black metal framework and a solid end post, blending natural and urban elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the hedge and the thickness of the end post.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full length of the hedge, metal rods, and the prominent end post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the end post and the hedge's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the hedge, metal framework, and the supporting base structure.
